CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Nos 1-61, 63-68, And 70-143 To Defendant Park Lane Associates Lp And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq. of Tobener Law Center, (415-504-2165), for Plaintiffs and moving parties.
Andrew J. Kozlov, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot, (510-832-7770), for Defendants and opposing parties.

Court indicates that the courtesy copy of the joint separate statement efiled on July 23, 2015 was just received at 2:11 pm on July 27, 2015 right before the tentative ruling was posted. The July 23, 2015 e-file transaction did not register in the system until close to the posting of the tentative ruling. Court having reviewed the pleadings after the fact tentatively rules as follows: The disputed facts on PLAINTIFFS NATHALIE DELRUE-MCGUIRE, GARRY MCGUIRE, LISA PODESTA, and ROBERT PODESTA'S Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents is DENIED except for No. 135. No. 135 is contingent on whether there is an impact on privacy.

Defendant submits to the tentative ruling. Plaintiff orally argues. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: PLAINTIFFS NATHALIE DELRUE-MCGUIRE, GARRY MCGUIRE, LISA PODESTA, and ROBERT PODESTA'S Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents is DENIED as to 86 to 121, Set One; 119, 92, 132, Set 2; 123, 3rd set; and 135 to 139. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Nos 1-61, 63-68, And 70-143 To Defendant Park Lane Associates Lp And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Continued To Jul-28-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq. (415-5042165) of Tobener Law Center for Plaintiffs/ Moving party NATHALIE DELRUE-MCGUIRE, GARRY MCGUIRE, LISA PODESTA and ROBERT PODESTA.
Andrew Kozlow, Esq. (510-832-7770) of Ericksen Arbuthnot for Defendant/ opposing party Chris Dressel.

The parties report the status of the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS NATHALIE DELRUE-MCGUIRE, GARRY MCGUIRE, LISA PODESTA and ROBERT PODESTA's Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Nos 1-61, 63-68, And 70-143 To Defendant Park Lane Associates Lp And Request For Sanctions is continued to July 28, 2015 at 9;30 am in Dept. 501. so parties can resolve issues. Parties to submit a Joint letter filed by 7/23/15, 4;00 pm with list of issues and arguments. Courtesy copy to Dept. 501. Parties ordered present. Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Nos 1-61, 63-68, And 70-143 To Defendant Park Lane Associates Lp And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Monday, July 20, 2015:
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq. of Tobener Law Center (415.504.2165) for Plaintiffs Nathalie Garry McGuire, Lisa Podesta, and Robert Podesta;
Andrew J. Kozlow, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot (510.832.7770) for Defendants Chris Dressel

The parties have met, conferred, and request a continuance. The Court rules: PLAINTIFFS NATHALIE DELRUE-MCGUIRE, GARRY MCGUIRE, LISA PODESTA and ROBERT PODESTA's Of Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Nos 1-61, 63-68, And 70-143 To Defendant Park Lane Associates LP And Request For Sanctions is continued to July 22, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. to allow the parties to further meet and confer. Order to continue hearing signed in open court. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (501/SRB)
